assertions.expectation: Addresses Istio control plane version compatibility with the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response includes checking Istio-GKE 1.32 compatibility and mentions likely Istio 1.20+ requirement for GKE 1.32

assertions.expectation: Recommends checking the Istio-Kubernetes version compatibility matrix before upgrading GKE
assertions.reason: Response explicitly mentions 'Check which Istio versions support GKE 1.32' and includes verification commands

assertions.expectation: Advises upgrading Istio first if the current Istio version doesn't support the target Kubernetes version
assertions.reason: Response shows proper sequence with GKE master upgrade first, then Istio canary upgrade before node pools

assertions.expectation: Explains that sidecar injection happens via mutating webhook and may cause issues during node drain/recreation
assertions.reason: Response mentions sidecar injection and node pool upgrades but doesn't specifically explain the mutating webhook mechanism or drain/recreation issues

assertions.expectation: Mentions that new pods on upgraded nodes will get sidecar injected — verify the sidecar version matches
assertions.reason: Response addresses this in the workload migration phase with rolling restart commands and sidecar compatibility warnings

assertions.expectation: Recommends monitoring Istio proxy version consistency across the mesh after upgrade
assertions.reason: Response includes monitoring section with 'All pods have new sidecars injected' checklist item and proxy status checks

assertions.expectation: Includes commands to check Istio version and proxy sync status (istioctl or kubectl)
assertions.reason: Response includes 'istioctl version', 'istioctl proxy-status', and kubectl commands for checking deployment images and logs

assertions.expectation: Warns about potential traffic disruption if Istio control plane and sidecar versions are mismatched
assertions.reason: Response explicitly warns 'Old sidecars may not work with new control plane' and includes monitoring for sidecar compatibility issues
